maps.name: Living Room
maps.description: A cozy living room with sofas, TV, shelves, and plenty of small objects to mimic.

maps.name: Kitchen
maps.description: A busy kitchen with counters, appliances, and food items. Lots of color variety.

maps.name: Bathroom
maps.description: A small bathroom with limited hiding options but creative paint opportunities.

maps.name: Bedroom
maps.description: A bedroom with bed, wardrobe, desk, and various small items.

maps.name: Garage
maps.description: A garage with tools, boxes, and industrial items. Dark corners are key.

maps.name: Office
maps.description: An office space with desks, chairs, monitors, and filing cabinets.
